introSection: Blue Dragon Train was a steel roller coaster located at Children's Grand Park in Neung-dong, Songdong-Gu, Seoul, South Korea. It was South Korea's first roller coaster. One of the ride's vehicles remains at the park on display.
fullText: Blue Dragon Train was a steel roller coaster located at Children's Grand Park in Neung-dong, Songdong-Gu, Seoul, South Korea. It was South Korea's first roller coaster. One of the ride's vehicles remains at the park on display.
